title: Terms of Use
description: Terms of Use for Neuroartan websites, digital surfaces, content, accounts, profiles, and related online services.
intro: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of Neuroartan websites, digital surfaces, content, account-related entry points, profile-related entry points, and related online services.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of These Terms
paragraphs: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of Neuroartan websites, digital surfaces, content, account-related entry points, profile-related entry points, and related online services.
By accessing or using the website, the user agrees to be bound by these Terms to the extent permitted by applicable law.
If the user does not agree to these Terms, the website should not be used.

Because Neuroartan is operating in a pre-incorporation development stage, these Terms must not be interpreted or presented as implying incorporation, registered-office status, revenue maturity, or broader commercial finality that does not yet legally exist. Public-facing website terms, legal-page presentation, contact surfaces, footer references, account-entry presentation, and institutional language must remain accurate to Neuroartan’s actual legal and operational stage.

In these Terms of Use, “Neuroartan”, “we”, “us”, and “our” refer to the Neuroartan project and, at the current stage, its founder-operator, Saeed Davoodi (public name: Artan Davoodi), unless the context clearly requires a different meaning.

sections.title: 2. Scope of Use
paragraphs: These Terms apply to website visitors, readers, subscribers, contact-channel users, account users, profile users, and any other person interacting with Neuroartan through the website or related digital interfaces.
Certain features, materials, or services may also be subject to additional terms, notices, or policies where expressly stated.

These Terms also govern public legal-page presentation and disclosure language used during the pre-incorporation stage to the extent such presentation relates to website access, website use, public communications, account access, profile access, and institutional representation through the website.

sections.title: 2A. Additional and Feature-Specific Terms
paragraphs: Certain features, interfaces, or product contexts may later be governed by additional terms, notices, consent layers, or feature-specific restrictions.
Those additional terms may apply, for example, to:
Where such a feature-specific or in-time notice applies, it will govern use of the relevant feature together with these Terms of Use.
list: account or profile activation
voice-enabled features
reflective or thought-related features
browser prototypes
future paid or restricted-access services
higher-sensitivity product contexts

sections.title: 3. Permitted Use
paragraphs: The website may be used only for lawful purposes and in a manner consistent with these Terms.

Users may access, read, and interact with publicly available content for personal, informational, editorial, or otherwise lawful purposes, provided that such use does not violate applicable law, intellectual property rights, platform integrity, or stated restrictions.

Where account or profile functionality is enabled, users may use those functions only for their intended and lawful purpose and only in accordance with these Terms and any related policy or feature-specific notice.

sections.title: 4. Prohibited Conduct
paragraphs: Users must not:
list: use the website in violation of applicable law or regulation
attempt unauthorized access to restricted systems, interfaces, infrastructure, accounts, or profile areas
interfere with website security, performance, availability, or integrity
introduce malicious code, abusive automation, scraping abuse, credential abuse, or harmful technical behavior
misrepresent identity, affiliation, authority, or relationship with Neuroartan
create false accounts, impersonate another person, or use account/profile systems in a deceptive, abusive, or unlawful manner
use reflective, thought-related, voice-related, or profile-related features for unlawful harm, credible violent threats, coercion, abuse, exploitation, or other serious misuse
use the website or future ICOS-related features to solicit, organize, facilitate, or meaningfully operationalize illegal activity
use the website in a way that intentionally exploits highly sensitive personal-input environments, including thought, profile, or voice features, for abuse, manipulation, or harm
reproduce, republish, distribute, or exploit protected content beyond what is permitted by law or express authorization
use the website in a way that creates material legal, technical, reputational, operational, privacy, or security risk

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property Notice
paragraphs: Unless otherwise stated, website content, structure, branding, names, marks, text, visuals, publications, system elements, and related materials are owned by Neuroartan or used under applicable rights or permissions.
No license, transfer, or ownership right is granted except where expressly stated or required by applicable law.
Use of protected materials remains subject to applicable copyright, trademark, licensing, and related legal protections.

sections.title: 6. Website Content and Information
paragraphs: Website content is provided for general informational, editorial, institutional, or communication purposes unless otherwise expressly stated.
Neuroartan seeks to present content with care, but does not guarantee that all website content is complete, current, error-free, uninterrupted, or suitable for every purpose.
Nothing on the website should be interpreted as legal, financial, regulatory, medical, or other professional advice unless explicitly designated as such.

Nothing on the website should be interpreted as a representation that Neuroartan has already reached a registered, revenue-generating, fully operational, or otherwise commercially mature status unless such status is expressly and accurately stated.

sections.title: 7. Accounts and Profile Features
paragraphs: Where Neuroartan enables account creation, authentication, or profile functionality, users are responsible for maintaining the accuracy of submitted information, protecting access credentials, and using the relevant features lawfully and in good faith.

Neuroartan may suspend, restrict, or terminate account or profile access where reasonably necessary to protect legal compliance, security, infrastructure integrity, operational continuity, platform integrity, other users, or institutional interests.
These Terms do not represent that all account, profile, or user-feature functionality is always active. References to such features describe the legal terms that apply where they are enabled.

sections.title: 7A. Voice, Reflection, and Thought-Related Features
paragraphs: Where Neuroartan enables voice, reflection, journaling, thought-banking, profile-memory, or similar ICOS-related features, those features must be used lawfully, responsibly, and in accordance with these Terms, the Privacy Policy, the Disclaimer, and any related consent notice.
Such features are not provided as crisis services, emergency services, therapy, diagnosis, treatment, or law-enforcement substitutes unless explicitly and lawfully designated as such.
Users must not rely on these features as if they guarantee intervention, rescue, or prevention in safety-critical situations.

sections.title: 8. External Links and Third-Party Services
paragraphs: The website may contain links, references, integrations, or embedded elements associated with third-party services or external websites.
Neuroartan does not control all external services and is not responsible for third-party content, policies, availability, or practices except to the extent required by law.
Access to third-party services may be subject to separate legal terms and privacy practices.

sections.title: 9. Service Availability
paragraphs: Neuroartan may modify, suspend, restrict, or discontinue part or all of the website, content, features, account functions, profile functions, or technical availability at any time, with or without notice, where operationally, legally, strategically, or technically necessary.
No specific level of uptime, uninterrupted access, perpetual account availability, or perpetual feature availability is guaranteed unless expressly committed in a separate binding agreement.

Website features, communication channels, institutional descriptions, account functions, profile functions, or public-facing functional surfaces may evolve during the pre-incorporation stage and should not be interpreted as a representation of fixed corporate scale, registration maturity, or final commercial operating state.

sections.title: 10. Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by applicable law, the website and its content are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis.

Neuroartan disclaims warranties, representations, and guarantees not expressly stated, including implied warranties relating to availability, merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, uninterrupted operation, or uninterrupted account/profile access, except where such disclaimers are not legally permitted.

sections.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by applicable law, Neuroartan shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, special, exemplary, or similar damages arising from or related to access to or use of the website, inability to use the website, reliance on website content, technical failure, service interruption, third-party behavior, account restrictions, profile restrictions, or unauthorized access events.
Nothing in these Terms excludes liability to the extent liability cannot be lawfully excluded or limited under applicable law.

sections.title: 12. Privacy and Cookie-Related Matters
paragraphs: Use of the website may involve processing of personal data and use of cookies or similar technologies as described in the Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.
Those policies form part of the broader public legal disclosure framework governing the website.
Where account or profile functionality is enabled, related personal-data processing is also subject to the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 13. Suspension or Restriction of Access
paragraphs: Neuroartan may suspend, restrict, or block access where reasonably necessary to protect legal compliance, security, infrastructure integrity, intellectual property, operational continuity, institutional interests, or user safety.
Such action may be taken in response to suspected misuse, technical threat, policy violation, unlawful behavior, account abuse, profile misuse, fraud indicators, or other material risk indicators.

sections.title: 13A. Safety, Self-Harm, Harm-to-Others, and Illegal-Use Signals
paragraphs: Because Neuroartan may later provide highly sensitive spaces for reflection, thought-related input, profile development, or voice-enabled interaction, certain user activity or submitted content may raise serious trust, safety, legal, or misuse concerns.

Where content, usage, or related system signals suggest an imminent safety risk, serious self-harm risk, suicidal-risk context, credible harm-to-others risk, abuse risk, severe misuse risk, or meaningful illegal-use risk, Neuroartan may take protective, compliance, or security-related action where lawful and reasonably necessary.
Such action may include, depending on the context and legal basis:

Nothing in these Terms should be interpreted as a promise that Neuroartan will detect, interpret, or prevent every safety-critical or unlawful situation. At the same time, Neuroartan reserves the right to act where safety, legal, or trust-surface conditions reasonably require it.
list: internal review of the relevant content, account, or feature context
restriction, suspension, or interruption of a feature or account
preservation of relevant records for safety, compliance, security, or legal reasons
use of internal or third-party moderation, security, or escalation tools where applicable

notification to lawful authorities, emergency channels, or other appropriate parties where required by law or where Neuroartan reasonably determines that such escalation is necessary to address serious and imminent risk

sections.title: 14. Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: These Terms of Use may be updated from time to time to reflect legal, operational, technical, editorial, structural, account-related, or profile-related changes.
Where material changes occur, the revised version will be published with an updated effective date.

The “Last Updated” date at the top of these Terms indicates when these Terms were last revised. Changes become effective when the revised Terms are posted, unless a different effective rule is stated in the updated notice.
Continued use of the website after such publication may constitute acceptance of the revised Terms to the extent permitted by applicable law.

Where changes in legal status, incorporation stage, public contact posture, communication architecture, account architecture, profile architecture, or public representation risk materially affect website-facing legal disclosures, these Terms should be reviewed by GCA before the revised public version is treated as production-ready.

sections.title: 15. Governing Law and Interpretation
paragraphs: These Terms shall be interpreted in accordance with the governing legal framework applicable to Neuroartan’s operation, subject to any mandatory laws that apply based on user location, consumer protections, or non-waivable legal rights.
Jurisdiction-specific language may be supplemented where required by applicable law.

sections.title: 15A. Children and Minors
paragraphs: Neuroartan takes children’s and minors’ protection seriously.

Because Neuroartan may develop highly sensitive environments involving reflection, thought organization, profile development, or voice interaction, additional caution applies where children or minors are concerned.
Where a feature, service, or environment is not intended for children or minors, Neuroartan may restrict access, require age-related confirmation, or refuse activation of certain functions.
Where additional parental authorization, age-gating, supervision, or legal safeguards are required, those conditions must be satisfied before the relevant feature is used.

sections.title: 16. Contact
paragraphs: Questions regarding these Terms of Use may be directed through Neuroartan’s designated legal or official contact channel as published on the website.

During the pre-incorporation stage, public contact presentation must remain accurate to Neuroartan’s actual legal and operational posture and must not imply a registered-office or mature corporate status that does not yet legally exist.
